PROMPT: A contributor wants to add a CONTRIBUTORS.md file to the /data/repos/mcp-server-calculator repository. Your job is to: (1) inspect the git commit log for the repository at /data/repos/mcp-server-calculator to identify all unique commit authors and their email addresses, then (2) create a new file at /data/repos/mcp-server-calculator/CONTRIBUTORS.md containing a markdown-formatted list of those contributors (name and email, one per line, sorted alphabetically by name). The file should include a top-level heading '# Contributors' and list each person as a bullet point in the format '- Full Name <email@example.com>'.
